- [ ] Data correction
- [ ] New record(s)

List the main changes clearly.

## Why this change

Explain why this change is needed.

## Sources / evidence

## Review notes

Anything the reviewer should pay special attention to.

## Checklist

- [ ] My change is scoped and reviewable
- [ ] I did not mix unrelated changes in one PR
- [ ] I added source links when changing records or classifications
- [ ] I checked for obvious duplicates or conflicts where relevant
- [ ] I kept wording neutral and consistent with the project tone
